brandText:
Modern Medical Technologies
Western Regional Center
servicesDescription: Here you get high-quality medical services from professionals in a comfortable environment.
diagnosticDepartmentDescription: High-tech diagnostics with guaranteed accuracy and reliability...
laboratoryDescription: Fast and accurate analyses you can trust...
testimonial1: Amazing professionals and a warm environment. Every visit gave me a sense of safety and trust...
testimonial2: The doctors’ care and attention are unforgettable. Accurate diagnosis and quick response...
testimonial3: I had seen many doctors before, but only in your clinic did I feel real trust and peace...
faq1_question: What are the clinic's working hours?
faq1_answer: The clinic operates daily except Saturday and Sunday from 09:30 to 17:30.
faq2_answer: The clinic is located at 40, Foti Street, Kutaisi.
faq3_question: Is it possible to receive test results by email?
faq3_answer: Yes, it is possible. You can leave your email when submitting tests.
faq4_question: Are you participating in the universal health insurance program?
faq4_answer: At the clinic, patients can undergo scheduled procedures and receive medical services covered by the state universal health insurance program.
faq5_question: How can I make an appointment with a doctor?
faq5_answer: You can make an appointment via the clinic's hotline - 0431 23 78 78.
faq6_question: How can I make an MRI appointment?
faq6_answer: Pre-booking is available at the following number - xxxxxxxxx.
title: Contact Us
locationDescription: Easily reachable — our address is 40 Poti St, Kutaisi.
systemGreeting: Hello! How can I help you?

aboutClinic.title: About Us
aboutClinic.paragraph1: "Western Regional Center for Modern Medical Technologies" is a multidisciplinary medical institution founded with the idea of creating a new standard, high-tech clinic in Western Georgia, where the patient is at the center of all decisions.
aboutClinic.visionText: To be a leading provider of medical services in the region, based on innovation, continuous improvement, and human values.
aboutClinic.missionText: To provide high-quality, safe, and accessible medical services to all patients through modern technologies and a professional team.
aboutClinic.paragraph2: We believe that every individual should have the opportunity to receive an accurate diagnosis, timely treatment, and empathetic care — this idea guides our team’s daily work.

values.patient: Patient-oriented – all our processes are built around the patient’s needs. We listen, care, and create an environment where the patient feels their health is our priority.
values.professionalism: Professionalism – our doctors and medical staff continuously attend international and local trainings, congresses, and workshops, ensuring the highest service quality.
values.technology: Modern technologies – the clinic is equipped with the latest medical equipment: digital radiology, laboratory diagnostics, ultrasound, and CT scanning.
values.ethics: Ethics and respect – we respect the patient’s dignity, confidentiality, and freedom of choice.
values.safety: Safety and quality – internal control mechanisms, standardized procedures, and continuous monitoring systems are implemented.

why.innovation: ✅ Innovative treatment approaches – we implement new therapeutic and surgical methods.
why.integration: ✅ Integrated services in one place – consultations, diagnostics, laboratory, inpatient care, and rehabilitation all in one place.
why.multidisciplinary: ✅ Multidisciplinary staff – a team of professional doctors ensures correct analysis of complex cases.
why.comfort: ✅ Comfortable environment – modern interior, secure infrastructure, and psychologically comfortable surroundings.

aboutClinic.qualityPolicyText: For us, quality is not only about results — it starts with each employee’s responsibility and is completed with patient satisfaction.

quality.hygiene: ✅ Strict hygiene and infection control measures

aboutClinic.socialResponsibilityText: We believe that the clinic is not only a service provider but also part of the community. Therefore, we conduct preventive screenings, raise awareness, and cooperate with local and international organizations.
aboutClinic.finalParagraph: "Western Regional Center for Modern Medical Technologies" is committed to providing the best care for patients of all ages and conditions.

noDoctorsFound: No doctors found for this service

Assisting in booking, visit planning, and patient movement
Organizing interpreters, transport, or additional services if needed
Coordination with other departments during patient service (doctors, reception, finance, etc.)

administrationSections.title: Pharmacy Department
items: Inventory control and monitoring of medications
Safe management of strictly controlled drugs according to regulations
Ensuring compliance with licensing and pharmaceutical requirements
